"1","Amazon EC2 (Elastic Compute Cloud)","Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud (EC2) provides scalable virtual servers in the cloud. You can launch instances with various operating systems, configure security and networking, and manage storage. EC2 is a core AWS compute service used for hosting applications, running workloads, and scaling infrastructure as needed.","AWS Service","compute, virtual machine, ec2, cloud computing"

"2","AWS Lambda","AWS Lambda is a serverless compute service that lets you run code without provisioning or managing servers. You pay only for the compute time you consume. Lambda supports multiple programming languages and can be triggered by AWS services or HTTP requests via API Gateway. It is ideal for event-driven applications and microservices.","AWS Service","compute, serverless, lambda, functions"

"3","Amazon ECS (Elastic Container Service)","Amazon ECS is a fully managed container orchestration service that makes it easy to run, stop, and manage Docker containers on a cluster. You can use ECS with Fargate (serverless) or EC2 instances. It integrates with AWS services like load balancers and IAM.","AWS Service","compute, containers, docker, ecs"

"4","Amazon EKS (Elastic Kubernetes Service)","Amazon EKS is a managed Kubernetes service that simplifies running Kubernetes on AWS without needing to install and operate your own Kubernetes control plane. It is certified Kubernetes-conformant and supports existing Kubernetes tools and plugins.","AWS Service","compute, kubernetes, containers, eks"

"5","AWS Fargate","AWS Fargate is a serverless compute engine for containers that works with both ECS and EKS. It allows you to run containers without managing the underlying servers or clusters. You just define your application requirements and Fargate handles the infrastructure.","AWS Service","compute, serverless, containers, fargate"

"6","Amazon S3 (Simple Storage Service)","Amazon S3 is an object storage service offering industry-leading scalability, data availability, security, and performance. It is designed to store and retrieve any amount of data from anywhere. Common use cases include backup and restore, data lakes, websites, and cloud-native applications.","AWS Service","storage, object storage, s3, bucket"

"7","Amazon EBS (Elastic Block Store)","Amazon EBS provides persistent block storage volumes for use with Amazon EC2 instances. It offers high availability and durability, and you can choose between SSD and HDD volumes. EBS volumes can be backed up via snapshots to S3.","AWS Service","storage, block storage, ebs, volumes"

"8","Amazon RDS (Relational Database Service)","Amazon RDS makes it easy to set up, operate, and scale a relational database in the cloud. It supports multiple database engines including MySQL, PostgreSQL, MariaDB, Oracle, and SQL Server. RDS automates administrative tasks like hardware provisioning, patching, and backups.","AWS Service","database, relational, rds, mysql, postgresql"

"9","Amazon DynamoDB","Amazon DynamoDB is a fully managed NoSQL key-value and document database that delivers single-digit millisecond performance at any scale. It is serverless and supports auto-scaling, global tables, and backups. It is ideal for web, mobile, gaming, and IoT applications.","AWS Service","database, nosql, dynamodb, key-value"

"10","Amazon VPC (Virtual Private Cloud)","Amazon Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) lets you provision a logically isolated section of the AWS cloud where you can launch AWS resources in a virtual network that you define. You have complete control over your virtual networking environment, including IP addresses, subnets, route tables, and network gateways.","AWS Service","networking, vpc, network, security"

"11","AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)","AWS IAM enables you to manage access to AWS services and resources securely. Using IAM, you can create and manage AWS users and groups, and use permissions to allow or deny their access to resources. IAM is a critical security service for controlling authentication and authorization.","AWS Service","security, iam, access control, identity"

"12","Amazon CloudFront","Amazon CloudFront is a fast content delivery network (CDN) service that securely delivers data, videos, applications, and APIs to customers globally with low latency and high transfer speeds. It integrates with other AWS services like S3, EC2, and Lambda@Edge.","AWS Service","networking, cdn, cloudfront, content delivery"

"13","AWS Lambda","AWS Lambda is a serverless compute service that runs your code in response to events and automatically manages the underlying compute resources. It is a key service for building event-driven architectures and serverless applications.","AWS Service","compute, serverless, lambda, event-driven"

"14","Amazon API Gateway","Amazon API Gateway is a fully managed service that makes it easy for developers to create, publish, maintain, monitor, and secure APIs at any scale. You can create RESTful and WebSocket APIs that act as a front door for applications to access data, business logic, or functionality from backend services.","AWS Service","networking, api, api gateway, serverless"

"15","AWS CloudFormation","AWS CloudFormation is an infrastructure as code (IaC) service that allows you to model your entire infrastructure in a text file (template). It enables you to provision and manage AWS resources in an orderly and predictable fashion, simplifying deployments and updates.","AWS Service","management, infrastructure as code, cloudformation, automation"

"16","Amazon CloudWatch","Amazon CloudWatch is a monitoring and observability service that provides data and actionable insights for AWS, hybrid, and on-premises applications. You can collect metrics, logs, and events, set alarms, and automate responses. It helps you monitor resource utilization and application performance.","AWS Service","management, monitoring, cloudwatch, metrics"

"17","AWS Wipro Partnership Overview","Wipro is an AWS Premier Partner with deep expertise in cloud migration, modernization, and managed services. The partnership focuses on helping enterprises accelerate their digital transformation journey using AWS. Wipro has multiple AWS Competencies including Migration, DevOps, Data & Analytics, and SAP.","Partnership","wipro, aws, partnership, premier partner"

"18","Wipro AWS Migration Services","Wipro offers end-to-end migration services for moving on-premises workloads to AWS. This includes discovery, assessment, planning, execution, and validation. Wipro's Cloud Migration Factory uses automation to accelerate migrations, ensuring minimal downtime and risk.","Wipro Offering","wipro, migration, cloud migration, aws migration"

"19","Wipro Managed Services for AWS","Wipro provides comprehensive managed services for AWS environments, including 24/7 monitoring, incident management, security compliance, patching, backup, and cost optimization. Their managed services help customers reduce operational overhead and focus on innovation.","Wipro Offering","wipro, managed services, operations, support"

"20","Wipro DevOps on AWS","Wipro helps organizations implement DevOps practices on AWS using CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code (CloudFormation/Terraform), containerization (Docker/Kubernetes), and automated testing. This accelerates software delivery and improves reliability.","Wipro Offering","wipro, devops, ci/cd, automation"

"21","Wipro Data & Analytics on AWS","Wipro offers data and analytics solutions on AWS, including data lake implementations, data warehousing (Redshift), real-time analytics (Kinesis), and business intelligence (QuickSight). Their BoundaryLess Data Lake solution is a pre-built framework for building scalable data lakes on AWS.","Wipro Offering","wipro, data, analytics, data lake, boundaryless"

"22","Wipro BoundaryLess Data Lake","Wipro BoundaryLess Data Lake is an integrated data lake solution on AWS that simplifies ingestion, processing, and consumption of structured and unstructured data. It leverages AWS services like S3, Glue, Athena, and Redshift, and includes pre-built connectors and governance features.","Wipro Offering","wipro, data lake, boundaryless, big data"

"23","Wipro SAP on AWS","Wipro helps customers run SAP workloads on AWS, providing services for migration, implementation, and managed operations. They have deep expertise in SAP HANA and SAP S/4HANA on AWS, ensuring high performance, availability, and security.","Wipro Offering","wipro, sap, hana, s/4hana"

"24","Wipro Cloud Car","Wipro Cloud Car is a connected vehicle solution built on AWS. It leverages IoT, analytics, and machine learning to provide features like predictive maintenance, driver behavior analysis, and over-the-air updates. It helps automotive manufacturers transform their vehicle operations.","Wipro Offering","wipro, iot, automotive, connected car"

"25","Wipro aiNXT","Wipro aiNXT is an AI and automation platform that uses AWS AI services (like SageMaker, Rekognition, Comprehend) to deliver intelligent automation solutions. It helps enterprises automate business processes and gain insights from data.","Wipro Offering","wipro, ai, ml, automation"

"26","Wipro AWS Competencies","Wipro has achieved several AWS Competencies, which validate its expertise and customer success in specific areas. These include Migration, DevOps, Data & Analytics, SAP, and others. Competencies demonstrate that Wipro has deep technical proficiency and proven success in delivering AWS solutions.","Wipro Offering","wipro, competencies, aws partner"

"27","Wipro AWS Training and Certification","Wipro offers AWS training and certification programs to upskill professionals. They provide instructor-led training, digital courses, and exam preparation for AWS certifications, helping individuals and teams build cloud skills.","Wipro Offering","wipro, training, certification, education"

"28","Wipro Cloud Management Console","Wipro has developed a custom cloud management console that provides a unified view of AWS resources, cost dashboards, compliance checks, and automation workflows. It enhances visibility and control for enterprises managing large AWS environments.","Wipro Offering","wipro, management console, cost optimization, governance"

"29","Wipro Cost Optimization on AWS","Wipro helps customers optimize their AWS spending through FinOps practices, right-sizing resources, reserved instance recommendations, and automated policies. Their cost optimization services ensure that customers get maximum value from their AWS investments.","Wipro Offering","wipro, cost optimization, finops, savings"

"30","Wipro Disaster Recovery on AWS","Wipro designs and implements disaster recovery solutions on AWS using services like AWS Elastic Disaster Recovery, CloudEndure, and storage replication. They help ensure business continuity with minimal RPO and RTO.","Wipro Offering","wipro, disaster recovery, dr, business continuity"

"31","AWS Well-Architected Framework","The AWS Well-Architected Framework provides best practices for designing and operating reliable, secure, efficient, and cost-effective systems in the cloud. It includes five pillars: Operational Excellence, Security, Reliability, Performance Efficiency, and Cost Optimization.","AWS Best Practice","well-architected, best practices, design"

"32","Wipro Well-Architected Reviews","Wipro conducts AWS Well-Architected Reviews to assess customers' existing AWS architectures against the framework's best practices. They provide recommendations for improvement and help implement changes to enhance performance, security, and cost efficiency.","Wipro Offering","wipro, well-architected, review, assessment"

"33","Wipro Cloud Migration Factory","Wipro's Cloud Migration Factory is an industrialized approach to migration that uses automation, standardized processes, and tools to accelerate large-scale migrations to AWS. It includes discovery, wave planning, automated server replication, and cutover.","Wipro Offering","wipro, migration, automation, migration factory"

"34","AWS Control Tower","AWS Control Tower provides a pre-configured, secure, and governed multi-account environment based on AWS best practices. It automates the setup of a landing zone and enforces policies through guardrails.","AWS Service","governance, control tower, multi-account, landing zone"

"35","Wipro AWS Control Tower Implementation","Wipro helps customers implement AWS Control Tower to set up a well-architected multi-account environment. They customize landing zones, configure guardrails, and integrate with existing identity and compliance systems.","Wipro Offering","wipro, control tower, governance, landing zone"

"36","Wipro GRC on AWS","Wipro offers governance, risk, and compliance (GRC) solutions on AWS, helping customers meet regulatory requirements and internal policies. They leverage AWS services like Config, CloudTrail, and Security Hub, and add automated compliance monitoring and reporting.","Wipro Offering","wipro, grc, compliance, governance"

"37","Wipro Security Services on AWS","Wipro provides comprehensive security services for AWS, including security assessments, incident response, identity and access management, data protection, and threat detection. They use native AWS security tools and third-party solutions to protect customer workloads.","Wipro Offering","wipro, security, iam, threat detection"

"38","AWS Marketplace","AWS Marketplace is a digital catalog with thousands of software listings from independent software vendors. It simplifies software licensing and deployment on AWS. Wipro offers several of its solutions through AWS Marketplace, including BoundaryLess Data Lake and aiNXT.","AWS Service","marketplace, software, procurement"

"39","Wipro in AWS Marketplace","Wipro has listed multiple offerings in AWS Marketplace, making it easy for customers to discover, procure, and deploy Wipro solutions directly on AWS. These include BoundaryLess Data Lake, aiNXT, and various consulting services.","Wipro Offering","wipro, marketplace, software"

"40","AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF)","The AWS Cloud Adoption Framework provides guidance and best practices to help organizations build a comprehensive approach to cloud adoption. It organizes guidance into six perspectives: Business, People, Governance, Platform, Security, and Operations.","AWS Best Practice","cloud adoption, caf, framework"

"41","Wipro Cloud Advisory Services","Wipro offers cloud advisory services to help customers define their cloud strategy, assess readiness, and create a roadmap for AWS adoption. Their experts guide enterprises through the early stages of cloud journey, ensuring alignment with business goals.","Wipro Offering","wipro, advisory, strategy, consulting"

"42","Wipro Application Modernization on AWS","Wipro helps customers modernize legacy applications using AWS services like containers, serverless, and managed databases. They refactor, re-platform, or re-architect applications to improve agility, scalability, and reduce costs.","Wipro Offering","wipro, modernization, refactoring, containers"

"43","Wipro Mainframe Modernization on AWS","Wipro specializes in migrating and modernizing mainframe workloads to AWS. They use automated tools and proven methodologies to rehost, replatform, or refactor mainframe applications, helping customers reduce dependency on legacy infrastructure.","Wipro Offering","wipro, mainframe, modernization, migration"

"44","AWS Snow Family","AWS Snow Family includes physical devices (Snowcone, Snowball Edge, Snowmobile) used for edge computing and data transfer to AWS. They are ideal for scenarios with limited network connectivity, high data volumes, or edge processing needs.","AWS Service","snowball, snowcone, snowmobile, edge computing"

"45","Wipro Edge Solutions on AWS","Wipro offers edge computing solutions leveraging AWS Snow Family and IoT services. They help customers process data at the edge for use cases like manufacturing, retail, and remote monitoring, ensuring low latency and real-time insights.","Wipro Offering","wipro, edge, iot, snowball"

"46","Amazon SageMaker","Amazon SageMaker is a fully managed service that enables developers and data scientists to build, train, and deploy machine learning models quickly. It provides tools for labeling data, building algorithms, and deploying models at scale.","AWS Service","machine learning, sagemaker, ai, ml"

"47","Wipro AI/ML on AWS","Wipro leverages AWS AI/ML services like SageMaker, Rekognition, and Comprehend to build intelligent solutions for customers. They develop custom models and integrate AI into business processes across industries like healthcare, finance, and manufacturing.","Wipro Offering","wipro, ai, ml, machine learning"

"48","Wipro Healthcare Solutions on AWS","Wipro offers healthcare-specific solutions on AWS, including data analytics for clinical research, patient engagement platforms, and compliance with HIPAA. They use AWS's secure and scalable infrastructure to transform healthcare delivery.","Wipro Offering","wipro, healthcare, hipaa, life sciences"

"49","Wipro Financial Services on AWS","Wipro helps financial services institutions adopt AWS to meet regulatory requirements, enhance security, and drive innovation. They provide solutions for core banking transformation, fraud detection, risk analytics, and customer experience.","Wipro Offering","wipro, financial services, banking, fintech"

"50","Wipro Retail Solutions on AWS","Wipro offers retail solutions on AWS for inventory management, omnichannel commerce, personalized marketing, and supply chain optimization. They leverage AWS analytics and AI to help retailers improve efficiency and customer engagement.","Wipro Offering","wipro, retail, e-commerce, supply chain"

"51","AWS Partner Network (APN)","The AWS Partner Network (APN) is a global community of partners that leverage AWS to build solutions and services for customers. Wipro is an APN Premier Partner, the highest tier, indicating significant technical expertise and customer success.","Partnership","apn, partner, aws partner network"

"52","Wipro AWS LaunchPad","Wipro AWS LaunchPad is a co-innovation center where customers and Wipro teams collaborate to build and prototype solutions on AWS. It provides access to AWS experts, architects, and labs to accelerate innovation.","Wipro Offering","wipro, innovation, launchpad, co-innovation"

"53","Wipro FullStride Cloud Studio","Wipro FullStride Cloud Studio is a cloud readiness assessment and strategy service that helps customers evaluate their current IT landscape, define a cloud vision, and create a roadmap for AWS adoption. It includes workshops, assessments, and business case development.","Wipro Offering","wipro, cloud studio, assessment, strategy"

"54","AWS Graviton Processor","AWS Graviton processors are custom-built by AWS using 64-bit Arm cores to deliver the best price/performance for cloud workloads. They are used in EC2 instances, providing cost savings for scale-out and Arm-based applications.","AWS Service","graviton, processor, arm, ec2"

"55","AWS Outposts","AWS Outposts brings native AWS services, infrastructure, and operating models to virtually any data center, co-location space, or on-premises facility. It provides a fully managed hybrid cloud solution for workloads that require low latency or local data processing.","AWS Service","outposts, hybrid, on-premises, edge"

"56","Wipro Hybrid Cloud Solutions on AWS","Wipro helps customers design and implement hybrid cloud solutions using AWS Outposts, Storage Gateway, and Direct Connect. They enable seamless integration between on-premises environments and AWS, ensuring consistent operations and data mobility.","Wipro Offering","wipro, hybrid cloud, outposts, direct connect"

"57","AWS Direct Connect","AWS Direct Connect is a cloud service that makes it easy to establish a dedicated network connection from your premises to AWS. It can reduce network costs, increase bandwidth throughput, and provide a more consistent network experience.","AWS Service","direct connect, networking, dedicated connection"

"58","Wipro Networking on AWS","Wipro provides networking expertise on AWS, including designing VPC architectures, hybrid connectivity (Direct Connect, VPN), load balancing, and content delivery. They ensure secure, scalable, and high-performing network setups.","Wipro Offering","wipro, networking, vpc, direct connect"

"59","AWS Backup","AWS Backup is a fully managed backup service that makes it easy to centralize and automate the back up of data across AWS services. It supports EBS, RDS, DynamoDB, EFS, and more, providing a unified backup strategy.","AWS Service","backup, data protection, disaster recovery"

"60","Wipro Backup and Recovery on AWS","Wipro designs and implements backup and recovery strategies on AWS using AWS Backup, storage services, and third-party tools. They ensure data protection and compliance with RPO/RTO requirements.","Wipro Offering","wipro, backup, recovery, data protection"
